inject_files.content:
OPERATION: DEEP_LOOK
Status: COMPROMISED

The anomalous process from the boot log was not terminated.
It is still here.

To proceed: find what was 'overwritten' in the config file.

TR4CE > en1ry p0int f0und
TR4CE > h0st: l0calh0st
TR4CE > pr0c3ss: unkn0wn
TR4CE > payload: [3 fragm3nts r3quired]
TR4CE > awaiting fr4gm3nt 3

To whoever finds this:

The third fragment is hidden in the Games folder.
It doesn't look like a fragment. Look at the file size.

Fragment 3 of 3: OS

Combined key: MYSTERYOS

You found it. But now you know what it is.
Do you understand what you've done?

...

Congratulations. You've reached the end.
Or the beginning.

There is no anomalous process.
There never was.

You were the anomaly all along.

[ MysteryOS v1.0 - You Win ]
